bb_length.description: Number of periods for the Bollinger Band moving average.

bb_variation_min.description: Minimum band width variation (%) required to trigger a re-entry signal.

rsi_length.description: Number of periods used to calculate the RSI.

rsi_overbought.description: RSI level above which the asset is considered overbought.

rsi_oversold.description: RSI level below which the asset is considered oversold.

macd_fast.description: Number of periods for the fast EMA.

macd_slow.description: Number of periods for the slow EMA.

macd_signal.description: Number of periods for the signal line smoothing.

ema_length.description: Number of periods for the Exponential Moving Average.

sma_length.description: Number of periods for the Simple Moving Average.

atr_length.description: Number of periods for the Average True Range calculation.

atr_multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to ATR for threshold calculation.

stoch_k_length.description: Look-back period for %K (the fast stochastic line).

stoch_overbought.description: Level above which the oscillator signals overbought conditions.

stoch_oversold.description: Level below which the oscillator signals oversold conditions.

vwap_deviation.description: Standard deviation band distance from VWAP used as threshold.

supertrend_atr_length.description: ATR period used internally by the SuperTrend calculation.

supertrend_multiplier.description: ATR multiplier that controls the width of the SuperTrend bands.

senkou_b_length.description: Leading span B period (Senkou Span B).

displacement.description: Number of periods to shift the cloud forward (chikou displacement).
